title: FY2026 Comprehensive Infrastructure Review
subtitle: Annual Performance, Incident, and Spend Analysis
executive_summary: This annual review covers 50 operational metrics across all production services. Infrastructure availability remained above target at 99.94%. Twenty incidents were logged, with root causes spanning traffic spikes, deployment issues, and dependency failures. Cloud spend totaled $1.2M across 30 service categories. Fifteen recommendations are provided for the next fiscal year.

incidents.description: Service degradation in Compute (EC2/ECS) caused elevated error rates for approximately 2257 users.
incidents.root_cause: Resource contention triggered by capacity limit.

incidents.description: Service degradation in KMS caused elevated error rates for approximately 2544 users.
incidents.root_cause: Resource contention triggered by capacity limit.
incidents.resolution: Mitigated via configuration update. Postmortem completed.

recommendations: Recommendation 1: Replace KMS to reduce cost and improve reliability.
Recommendation 2: Deprecate Secrets Manager to reduce cost and improve reliability.
Recommendation 3: Scale SQS/SNS to reduce cost and improve reliability.
Recommendation 4: Audit Lambda Functions to reduce cost and improve reliability.
Recommendation 5: Automate KMS to reduce cost and improve reliability.
Recommendation 6: Evaluate SQS/SNS to reduce cost and improve reliability.
Recommendation 7: Automate Lambda Functions to reduce cost and improve reliability.
Recommendation 8: Replace Storage (S3/EBS) to reduce cost and improve reliability.
Recommendation 9: Implement KMS to reduce cost and improve reliability.
Recommendation 10: Review Elasticsearch to reduce cost and improve reliability.
Recommendation 11: Upgrade API Gateway to reduce cost and improve reliability.
Recommendation 12: Standardize API Gateway to reduce cost and improve reliability.
Recommendation 13: Migrate Compute (EC2/ECS) to reduce cost and improve reliability.
Recommendation 14: Monitor Secrets Manager to reduce cost and improve reliability.
Recommendation 15: Deprecate Database (RDS/DynamoDB) to reduce cost and improve reliability.
